inputs.label: Field Area
inputs.businessContext: Total land area under cultivation. Standard agricultural practice.

inputs.label: Crop Type
inputs.businessContext: Different crops have different yield potentials and growth parameters.

inputs.label: Planting Density
inputs.businessContext: Number of plants per unit area, affects yield.

inputs.label: Germination Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of seeds that germinate. Typical range 80-95%.

inputs.label: Survival Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of germinated plants that survive to maturity.

inputs.label: Ears per Plant
inputs.businessContext: Average number of ears per plant. For corn, typically 1-2.

inputs.label: Kernels per Ear
inputs.businessContext: Average number of kernels per ear. Varies by crop and hybrid.

inputs.label: Kernel Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of 1000 kernels, typically 250-350 g for corn.

inputs.label: Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Moisture percentage at harvest. Standard storage moisture is 15%.

inputs.label: Harvest Loss
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of yield lost during harvesting. Typical 3-7%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data quality. Used for adjusted yield.

rules: germinationRate + survivalRate must be <= 200? (no strict rule)
if cropType == 'rice' then fieldArea must be >= 0.1
if moistureContent > 20 then harvestLoss must be increased by 2% (not enforced in formula)

thresholds.germinationRate < 70: Low germination rate may require replanting
thresholds.survivalRate < 70: Low survival rate indicates pest or disease issues
thresholds.moistureContent > 20: High moisture content may cause storage spoilage

suggestedActions: If germination rate low: test seed quality and soil conditions
If survival rate low: check for pests, diseases, or nutrient deficiencies
If moisture content high: delay harvest or use drying equipment
If harvest loss high: calibrate harvesting machinery
